programme.title: What If: Chase Dies in Space
programme.sub-title: What Would Dying on Every Planet Be Like?
programme.desc: If you landed on Venus, this hot planet would crush you - like a plastic bottle.It would be painful. But don't worry, it would only last five seconds. And just wait till you see what happens on Mars.

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.desc: Explore the rise of robots in every aspect of life, from AI-driven machines to automation, and what it means for the future of humanity!

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Home is where the heart is
programme.desc: Journey through the meaning of home, from cozy spaces to the emotional connections that make us feel truly at home, no matter where we are.

programme.title: How to Survive
programme.desc: Explore survival tactics for the most extreme scenarios in space, from malfunctioning spacesuits to surviving a black hole or life on Mars!

programme.title: How to Survive
programme.sub-title: Hidden Dangers: Pools, Germs, and Deadly Blooms
programme.desc: Uncover the hidden dangers lurking in everyday places, from contaminated pools to harmful algal blooms. Stay safe and informed!

programme.title: How to Survive
programme.desc: Stay safe and informed as we explore survival tips for intense situations, from surviving a punch by Mike Tyson to managing sleep paralysis and staying awake while driving!

programme.title: What If: Chase Dies in Space
programme.sub-title: What If You Spent a Nanosecond in a Black Hole?
programme.desc: What would the outcome be if you took a leap of faith straight into a black hole? Today, I’m taking you on a journey into the heart of darkness—just one nanosecond inside a black hole.

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Imagine a world split in half! Dive into scenarios where planets, moons, and entire systems are halved. What survives?

programme.title: This Week In Spaceflight
programme.desc: NASASpaceflight.com's weekly spaceflight update. A Falcon 9 second stage is stuck in orbit, NASA is looking for a new partner for the VIPER lunar rover, and an asteroid may have a 2.3% chance of hitting Earth in 2032! Meanwhile, Firefly’s Blue Ghost is preparing for lunar orbit insertion, and Astrolab’s FLIP rover joins Astrobotic’s Griffin-1 mission to the Moon.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella Lawson's love for Italy and Italian food began when she lived and worked in Florence before beginning her university studies. In "Nigellissima," the author and celebrity chef presents a series -- filmed in a custom-built replica of her own kitchen -- dedicated to her version of Italian food that incorporates the way people live in the U.K. While she is true to the spirit of Italian cooking, her recipes are always quick and easy, designed to transform everyday eating into light-on-touch feasts for when supper needs to be on the table pronto.

programme.title: Welcome to Valentine
programme.desc: Newly single and unemployed Olivia returns to her Nebraska hometown where she meets George. Starring Kathryn Davis (2023)

programme.title: Love Finds You in Valentine
programme.desc: A California girl inherits a ranch in the small town of Valentine, Nebraska. Before she sells, she decides to spend the summer learning about her family. Starring Michaela McManus (2016)

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: Garden store manager Jack falls for his boss's daughter. Unlucky for him, she is also his new boss. Can Jack win over the heart of love cynic, Kate? (2021)

programme.title: All Things Valentine
programme.desc: Avery is an advice columnist ready to give-up on the prospect love. But will she change her mind when she meets a handsome veterinarian? Sarah Rafferty and Sam Page star. (2016)

programme.title: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: Dan is a widower and single father who has no interest in dating. But will a chance meeting before Valentine's Day change his perspective on life and love? William Baldwin stars. (2012)

programme.title: Deadly BandB
programme.desc: A woman opens her dream bed-and-breakfast in a recently restored home, but the arrival of a dangerous guest quickly disturbs the peace. Stars Angie Patterson Muto and Chad Michael Collins (2018)

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: An aspiring actress takes a job impersonating a businessman's wife at a reception, but she soon finds herself in danger when she discovers where his actual wife is. Stars Nicholle Tom.

programme.title: A Dangerous Date
programme.desc: A girl begins to suspect that her father's new girlfriend is not what she seems. Starring Jillian Murray (2018)

programme.title: Killer Assistant
programme.desc: A magazine editor's life begins to unravel after she takes on a new assistant with secret motives of his own. Starring Arianne Zucker (2016)

programme.title: The Presence
programme.desc: A woman travels to an isolated cabin she begins to think she is losing her mind when her boyfriend comes to stay.

programme.title: 5 Weddings
programme.desc: An American journalist travels to India to cover Bollywood weddings, only to uncover a mosaic of cultural clashes, transgender tangles and lost loves with her travels culminating at a destination where the only journey is the one within.

programme.title: The Nora Roberts Collection Season 2
programme.desc: Nate Burns accepts a job as chief of police in Lunacy, Alaska, hoping to to get away from the traumatic death of his partner back in Baltimore. He meets Meg, an independent bush pilot, whose father is found dead in a mountain cave.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo World At His Feet
programme.desc: Cristiano Ronaldo: The World at His Feet follows the footballer from his beginnings in Portugal, breakthrough start with Manchester United and current career at Real Madrid.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog fight for survival after their plane crashes in the wilderness.

programme.title: Grace Unplugged
programme.desc: A talented young church singer runs away to Los Angeles in the hope of becoming a star.

programme.title: Six Weeks
programme.desc: A terminally ill girl tries to set up her mom, fulfilling her dream of having a family for her last six weeks.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog fight for survival after their plane crashes in the wilderness.

programme.title: From The Heart
programme.desc: Kathy Yoder has left her Amish ways and is a successful travel guide writer. When Kathy goes home to settle her dad's affairs, she's reminded of her life before she left the Amish community, including her old love, Isaac. Will Kathy decide to stay or return to her traveling lifestyle?

programme.title: Midway to Love
programme.desc: When the network announces that her television therapy show is changing to a tabloid shock-fest, a straight laced and caring psychologist returns to her hometown and reunites with her high school sweetheart while finally realizing that having someone to share a life with is more important than fame and the excitement of the city.

programme.title: A Nashville Wish
programme.desc: A young country singer dreams of making it big in Nashville and begins dating a popular cheerleader, but she doesn't share his love of music. When his career takes off, he must choose between love and following your destiny no matter what.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Navajo
programme.desc: A young Navajo Indian boy is caught up in the conflict of cultures when he rejects the white man's school. Told in semi-documentary style.

programme.title: El Rojo
programme.desc: The Sorenson family is massacred, apparently by Indians. On the site of the killing, a town, Gold Hill grows up, run by a group of businessmen.

programme.title: Hell's Outpost
programme.desc: A Korean war veteran attempts to help a small town mine owner develop his tungsten mine in spite of efforts by the town boss to stop him.

programme.title: The Reward's Yours... The Man's Mine
programme.desc: A group of killers seek out wanted gunman El Puro for the $10,000 dollar reward.

programme.title: A Town Called Hell
programme.desc: A group of Mexican revolutionaries murders a town priest and a number of his christian followers. Ten years later, a widow arrives in town intent to take revenge from her husband's killers.

programme.title: Moose Movie
programme.desc: Nothing shouts northern wilderness more than a magnificent bull moose, the undisputed king of the forest. But moose don't start out big and burly for two twins born into a forest glade a challenging life lies ahead. They'll need to quickly learn the ways of the wilderness, how to find food and cope with predators. We'll watch the first episodes of their young lives as they find their place among their giant cousins. It's a story with enough drama to fill a Hollywood movie – a moose movie.

programme.title: Meet The Marsupials
programme.desc: Few countries have a more iconic representative in the animal kingdom than Australia and the marsupial. Marsupials were once found across the planet, but over time they found their way to the outback, leaving Australia as an ark carrying the future of pouch mammals. As varied as they are unusual, marsupials are a weird and wonderful mob of animals who carry their young in a pouch. Whether hopping, climbing or even airborne, marsupials are some of the strangest but most fascinating creatures you're likely to meet.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile: Episode 1
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Brown Bears Teddy Bears Picnic
programme.desc: If you go down to the woods today a wonderful treat awaits! The home of one of the planet's most loved and characterful animals – the brown bear. Baby bears have a lot to learn about life in the forest, but thankfully all bears know their way around a good picnic.

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: As soon as she arrives, conservationist Hannah Emde immerses herself in Namibia's wildlife. The first destination of her trip is the world-famous Naankuse Foundation near Windhoek

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: Hannah runs a health check on two female cheetahs with veterinarian Maaike. She then goes into the wilderness with Naankuse founder Marlice. Together they go in search of the elephant Apollo, which was resettled in the sanctuary. The former "problem" elephant now leads a peaceful life here.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live.In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff. This has resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: Recently Priscilla bought an adopted boy pup from a rival gang to the Gosa Burrow. Unfortunately his acceptance into the Gosa group was far from ideal. His life did not get any easier after this

programme.title: Meet The Marsupials
programme.desc: Few countries have a more iconic representative in the animal kingdom than Australia and the marsupial. Marsupials were once found across the planet, but over time they found their way to the outback, leaving Australia as an ark carrying the future of pouch mammals. As varied as they are unusual, marsupials are a weird and wonderful mob of animals who carry their young in a pouch. Whether hopping, climbing or even airborne, marsupials are some of the strangest but most fascinating creatures you're likely to meet.

programme.title: Caribbean sisters: The Lesser Antilles St. Kitts & Nevis
programme.desc: In the centre of the Caribbean, volcanoes rise steeply from the sea, thus shaping the sister islands of St. Kitts & Nevis. Their slopes, covered in lush rainforests, snow-white, sandy beaches and the surrounding tur-quoise tinted waters provide the ultimate setting for this record-breaking, albeit tiny island paradise: Both islets are the smallest of the Caribbean dwarf states and also rank among the world's ten smallest states. A hot pepper sauce, made of a creative mixture of ginger, garlic, thyme and extraordinarily hot chillies that thrive in the hot and humid climate of Nevis, is simmering on the stove of Violet and Llewellyn's house. Lemmy Pemberton digs up abandoned turtle nests with his bare hands, as he wants to be certain that all of the babies have indeed managed to make it. Members of the Turtle Group catch sea turtles in order to take their measurements and fit them with transmitters. Taxi bus-es are not only the main means of transport on St. Kitts & Nevis, they are also an artistic expression of each driver's personality. Colourfully embellished, each taxi represents island art on wheels.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean. (S1 E05)

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation. (S1 E04)

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: This episode focuses on people from five countries who share a common passion: The production of their own food and food. What culinary treasures are hidden in the different regions, from Spitsbergen to Sweden, Austria, Poland and Chad? (S1 E03)

programme.title: Follow Your Cat
programme.desc: Follow us while we follow cats on their hunting grounds for mice and birds. Experience the double life of your domestic tiger... she will lead you on adventures that you never thought were possible. With a behavioural scientist that specializes in cats and modern technology we follow the cat on their wanderings into the wild. She maps their routes, unveils their secret favourite places, chronicles their territorial conquests, and shows us the entertaining habits of this enigmatic creature.

programme.title: Strandwolf
programme.desc: She moves through the seal colony on Namibia's wild Skeleton Coast with purpose and focus, gingerly stepping around the adults who snap at her heels. She's searching for smaller prey. Following her is a young German field scientist, Ingrid Wiesel, who has now spent 17 years with Tosca's clan tracking, observing, and learning everything she can about one of the world's least understood and most unusual predators.

programme.title: The Dying King
programme.desc: In the open wilderness of Africa, there are only 20.000 lions living a free life. In the last decade, humans have killed hundreds of thousands– mostly for purely hunting purposes. In the last couple of years, a new industry has developed called the canned hunting, where animals are bred for 4-5 years then released into a confined area. This confined area is created for the sole purpose optimizing the odds of the hunter obtaining a kill. The corpse of the dead, often male, lion is thereby treated as a trophy. Tourists pay up to 40, 000 USD for this 'privilege'.

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: They're not whales at all, but by far the largest fish in the sea. They are not a threat to humans, but their numbers are dramatically shrinking. Like elephants slaughtered for their ivory tusks, whale sharks are relentlessly pursued by poachers.

programme.title: Blue Realm

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: The Listener: Witness for the Prosecution

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Leverage - 16 Year Anniversary - The Wedding Job: To retrieve the money promised to the family of an innocent man who took the fall for a Mafia boss, the Leverage team poses as the wedding planners for the don's only daughter on her big day. Somehow, the team must manage to pull off a wedding while pulling off the heist... all while avoiding a dangerous Russian mobster known as The Butcher.

programme.title: The Lost World Remastered
programme.desc: The Lost World Remastered - Absolute Power: The group finds an ancient temple where they discover the crude etching of an atom dating back thousands of years. A ray of light knocks Challenger out, leaving the others frantic to save him. Challenger continues to live an alternate reality in his mind where he has gained the ability to manipulate the law of physics, but this newfound power changes Challenger and endangers his friends!

programme.title: The Lost World Remastered
programme.desc: The Lost World Remastered - Camelot: Marguerite is set to be betrothed to King Gawain. Roxton, Veronica, and Malone come to save her but get their weapons confiscated upon entry. They find out that the king's council, Vordred, is planning to kill him and take his throne. Gawain has them they retrieve the tooth from a T-rex to prove to the king that they're true of heart.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians - 10 Year Anniversary - And the Fangs of Death: Flynn leads his fellow Librarians on a mission to rescue kidnapped Charlene, unwittingly ensnaring them in a subterranean trap filled with ancient Egyptian werewolves, led by nemesis Apep, who are determined to kill the Librarians once and for all.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians - 10 Year Anniversary - And the Reunion of Evil: A routine artifact retrieval is anything but when the artifact grafts itself to Cassandra. Meanwhile a blizzard forces Stone and Cassandra to take shelter at a mysterious hotel that is hosting a demon convention, who want the artifact for themselves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians - 10 Year Anniversary - And the Self-Fulfilling Prophecy: After seeing a vision of her own death at the hands of a supernatural assassin, Baird tries to cheat fate and stop the deadly prophecy from coming true.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Leverage - 16 Year Anniversary - The Mile High Job: The Leverage team attempts to expose a conglomerate's cover-up of their toxic fertilizer which has resulted in the death of a young girl. But the CEO has put all the damning evidence on a plane to the Cayman Islands. The team races to catch the flight but, once airborne, they discover that the CEO's intentions are far more sinister... and that to avenge one life they'll have to save their own.

programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Blippi Visits an Orange Farm
programme.desc: Join Blippi as he visits Showcase of Citrus Orange Farm in Clermont, Florida.

programme.title: The Berry Lucky Day
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play—a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park. With Huck on his way, Cherry practices her singing. She believes her ability to hit a perfect high note is the result of a good luck charm—a beautiful crystal — that she keeps in her pocket. Although Strawberry says singing isn't about luck, but about practice and hard work, Cherry isn't convinced.

programme.title: The Littlest Berrykin
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, “The Littlest Berrykin,” into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics. But before leaving, they must choose which of their three princesses (played by Lemon, Raspberry and Strawberry in royal gowns) will rule the kingdom.

programme.title: The Berry Big Relay Race
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the “retrieve” part of the activity—as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search. Orange finds Strawberry, Plum and Raspberry in Lemon's salon, getting their hair and nails done, but something starts going terribly wrong with the appliances.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Foods that Crack
programme.desc: When her store-bought taco shells crack into a gazillion pieces, Lily cooks up a batch of home made taco shells that crunch without cracking. Meanwhile, Avery investigates how chickens lay eggs without cracking them, and makes a trip to see some of the biggest eggs of all – at an ostrich farm! Then our hosts take a crack at cooking each other's favourite omelet, and the results have Matt cracking up!

programme.title: Foods that Flow
programme.desc: Looking for ways to have a meal in a cup, Avery visits the Gimme A Squeeze Juice Bar to make fruit smoothies. Lily tries her hand at goat milking at a goat dairy farm. Back in the kitchen, Matt demonstrates how to taste two delicious soups in the same bowl.

programme.title: The Broken Wheel
programme.desc: But now the wheel won't spin, and Sid wonders how exactly wheels work? At school, Sid explores how wheels are simple machines that help move all kinds of things like cars, trains, tricycles, and even toy trucks!

programme.title: My Slide
programme.desc: Sid and his friends explore how inclined planes are simple machines that make it much easier to push up heavy things...including big stuffed animal dinosaurs!

programme.title: The Good Journey
programme.desc: Based on the New Testament parables The Prodigal Son and The Good Samaritan, this is the story of two estranged brothers sent on a cross country journey by their father in the hopes that they can find common ground while offering gratitude and forgiveness to others.

programme.title: Mary 4 Mayor
programme.desc: What begins for eighteen-yegar-old Mary Parson as a retaliation against her father, the mayor of their small town who abandoned his family after suffering a midlife crisis, turns into a full-scale war as Mary becomes the lone challenger to his re-election. Backed by her graduating high school friends, she discovers what she believes to be the cause of the town's woes that have contributed to its economic decline creating a low morale that isn't uncommon across the country. Running for mayor suddenly takes on a new purpose - along the way she has to determine what and more importantly who is working behind the scenes in blocking her and her teams' path to the promise of their campaign's slogan, “We Can Do Better!” She also has to overcome the very same distractions and human pitfalls that have weakened her father's resolve. In the end, armed with truth, love and faith, she must work to not only save her town but her family as well.

programme.title: Timmy Time Narrated
programme.desc: Timmy is a little lamb with a lot to learn! Season 3, episodes 13 - 16. Narrated.

programme.title: The Very Small Creatures
programme.desc: Five curious little friends have fun exploring a child's play area when no one's around. Through play, Pink, Green, Yellow, Blue and Orange learn about themselves, each other and the world around them. Season 2, episodes 4 - 12.

programme.title: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5… Numberblocks!
programme.desc: The animated adventures of friends who can always count on each other Find out what happens when numbers come to life and how they really work − and play − with the Numberblocks. Season 1, episodes 21 - 24.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun and his frolicsome Flock return, along with the Farmer and the long-suffering sheepdog Bitzer, for plenty more hilarious farmyard antics in Season 2. Episodes 31-33.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: After a summer of competing in their own sporting extravaganza, Shaun and the Flock return, along with Shaun's best mate, the ever faithful Bitzer, the Farmer, and all the Mossy Bottom Farm favourites. Season 3, episodes 10 - 12.

programme.title: Episodes from the Epic Adventures of Morph
programme.desc: Morph and Chas embark on epic adventures that take them beyond their desktop home and into the wider world. Season 1, episodes 1 - 4.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep

programme.title: Sol
programme.desc: The longest night ever will never end unless one small boy can find the light and bring it back to the world.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit's Cracking Contraptions
programme.desc: Wallace & Gromit's Cracking Contraptions - Shopper 13: It's just a short nip to the shops but it can become a daily chore when you have all that cheese to carry home. Wallace has decided to save his legs by initiating a program of guided shopping trolleys to the supermarket.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit head to the moon in a home-made rocket for their annual picnic. Despite some hiccups, the duo makes it just in time for lunch. But a resident mechanical caretaker isn't too happy to see Wallace eating slices of moon cheese…

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Going Golfing // Case of the Stolen Spectacles
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Up in the Air // AdDRESSing the Problem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Bad Hair Day // Ice is Nice
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.
